title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE PHILIPPINE NATIONAL AGRICULTURAL SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF STA. MARIA, BULACAN, TO FORTUNATO F. HALILI NATIONAL AGRICULTURAL SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. NO. 3593 / 88 OG No. 20, 2932 (May 18, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7331, March 31, 1992 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE PHILIPPINE NATIONAL AGRICULTURAL SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF STA. MARIA, BULACAN, TO FORTUNATO F. HALILI NATIONAL AGRICULTURAL SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Philippine National Agricultural School in Ouyong, Sta. Maria, Bulacan, is hereby changed to Fortunato F. Halili National Agricultural School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on April 5, 1990 and January 23, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: March 31, 1992

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
